## Summary

- 

## Scope

- [ ] GitHub Pages / 静态站点
- [ ] iOS App
- [ ] 题库内容
- [ ] 仓库治理 / 文档

## Validation

- [ ] `node --check assets/app.js`
- [ ] `node --check assets/data.js`
- [ ] `node scripts/validate-data.mjs`
- [ ] `./scripts/check-fast.sh`
- [ ] `./scripts/check-full.sh`
- [ ] 如涉及静态站点，确认 `q/`、`c/`、`sitemap.xml` 与 `assets/data.js` 同步
- [ ] 如涉及 iOS，确认 `xcodebuild -scheme InterviewPrep build` 通过
- [ ] 手动预览关键交互
